name: Internship Report
description: Internship/training report documenting work done at a company or organization. Includes company profile, work details, outcomes, and conclusion.

sections.heading: Cover Page
sections.content_hint: Internship title, intern name, company name, duration, date

sections.heading: Certificate
sections.content_hint: Certificate of completion from the organization

sections.heading: Acknowledgement
sections.content_hint: Acknowledgements to company mentors, supervisors, and colleagues

sections.heading: Abstract
sections.content_hint: Brief summary of the internship, activities, and learning outcomes

sections.heading: 1. Company Profile
sections.content_hint: Overview of the organization, history, mission, products/services

sections.heading: 2. Work Done
sections.content_hint: Detailed description of tasks, projects, technologies used, responsibilities

sections.heading: 3. Outcomes
sections.content_hint: Learning outcomes, skills acquired, contributions to the organization

sections.heading: 4. Conclusion
sections.content_hint: Overall experience summary, recommendations, future scope

sections.heading: References
sections.content_hint: References and resources used during the internship
